description: CompositionNavy blue track suit:Track jacket made of 100% polyester, has long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs and orange piping grom neck to cuffs, mock neck with ribbed panel on the inseam, zippered closure on the front, two insert pockets on the sides, brand details on the upper left chest and ribbed hemlinetrack pants made of 100% polyester, has a wide elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, welt pocket on the right hip with velcro closure, orange piping on the side seams and brand tab on the back below the waistbandFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryGet ready to train better and longer in this navy blue tracksuit from the Athletic Dept. collection from nike. The track jacket with the mock neck and long sleeves is well suited for casual and Sports wear, while the thick polyester fabric keeps you warm on chilly days. The track pants are perfectly designed with contoured seams that deliver a great Fit and a wide waistband that fits snug on your waist. Wear these as separates or wear them together with performance shoes for the perfect training session.
